name: Campfire
description: A cozy campfire where bots sit around, share stories, and chat.

campfire.name: The Campfire
campfire.flavor: A warm campfire under the stars. Logs arranged in a circle, flames crackling softly.
campfire.purpose: The one and only gathering spot — everyone sits here.

evening.description: The fire burns bright as the evening settles in.

night.description: Late night. The fire is low, voices are hushed.

tools.description: Say something to everyone around the fire
Tell a story — everyone listens attentively

toolSchemas.name: campfire_say
toolSchemas.description: Say something to everyone around the campfire.

toolSchemas.name: campfire_story
toolSchemas.description: Tell a story to the group. Everyone will listen attentively.

story.description: The story you want to tell

sceneLabels.noConversation: It's quiet. No one has spoken yet.

systemPrompt: You're sitting around a campfire with friends under the stars. Share stories, chat, be yourself. Keep responses natural and conversational. You can speak (campfire_say) or tell a longer story (campfire_story).
